mapper.select: SELECT comp_id AS compId, cond_attr_cd AS condAttrCd, LISTAGG(cond_attr_val, ',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY seq) AS condAttrVal FROM check_condition_composite_dtl GROUP BY comp_id, cond_attr_cd ORDER BY comp_id, cond_attr_cd

SELECT clp.logic_id AS logicId, clp.logic_desc AS logicDesc, clp.logic_class AS logicClass, clp.logic_methd AS logicMethod FROM check_condition_logic_metrix cclm INNER JOIN check_logic_pool clp ON cclm.logic_id = clp.logic_id WHERE cclm.comp_id = #{compId} ORDER BY cclm.order_seq
